title: Persona Design for a Cryptocurrency Trader
scenario: Design a persona for a cryptocurrency trader who has a strong background in computer programming and has used various tools for technical analysis. The persona's name is Alex, and they are 32 years old. Create a detailed persona description, including demographics, goals, challenges, and pain points. Ensure the persona is 200-400 words, written in the third person, and is focused on the trader's cryptocurrency trading activities. Use a professional tone and a conversational style.
constraints: Must be written in the third person

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the persona description accurately reflect the provided context?
Is the tone of the persona description professional and conversational?
Is the persona description within the specified word count range?
